zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph de Meynell於1362年出生在英國德比夏爾柯克 明日香時，他的父親Richard de Meynell28歲，母親Joan de Kirk22歲。他於1383年與Christiana Chute在英國英格蘭德比夏爾柯克 明日香結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。他去世於1389年在英國德比夏爾德比享年27歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph de Meynell于1362年出生在英国德比夏爾柯克 明日香时，他的父亲Richard de Meynell28岁，母亲Joan de Kirk22岁。他于1383年与Christiana Chute在英国英格兰德比夏爾柯克 明日香结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。他去世于1389年在英国德比夏爾德比享年27岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Meynell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1 Norman, English: locative name from one of the French places named Mesnil, from Old French mesnil (Latin * mansionile, a diminutive of mansio ‘abode, habitation’), used of the country domain where a noble lived with his family and retainers. As a surname it may also be used of a member of the household, retainer. Some of the bearers listed below may belong to (2).
2 English: relationship name from the Continental Germanic female personal name Maginhild.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph de Meynell was born in 1362, in Kirk Langley, Derbyshire, England, his father, Richard de Meynell, was 28 and his mother, Joan de Kirk, was 22. He married Christiana Chute in 1383, in Kirk Langley, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. He died in 1389, in Derby, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 27.

Il a épousé Christiana Chute en 1383, à Kirk Langley, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1389, à Derby, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 27 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph de Meynellが1362年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアキルク ラングリーで生まれた時，父Richard de Meynellは28歳，母Joan de Kirkは22歳であった。1383年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアキルク ラングリーでChristiana Chuteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼は1389年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアデルビーで27歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph de Meynell(이)가 1362년 영국 더비실르 커크 랭글리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Meynell(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Kirk(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1383년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 커크 랭글리에서 Christiana Chute(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1389년 영국 더비실르 더비에서 27세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Meynell nasceu em 1362, em Kirk Langley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Meynell, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Kirk, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Christiana Chute em 1383, em Kirk Langley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1389, em Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 27 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph de Meynell родился в 1362 г. в местности кирк лангли, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Meynell было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Kirk, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Christiana Chute в 1383 г. в местности кирк лангли, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Он умер в 1389 г. в местности дирби, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 27 лет.
